sidebar.importConfirmDesc: This will detect the SDK in PATH, copy it to the SVC managed directory, and update environment variables.
sidebar.needsSwitch: Active version missing, please switch to another version

detail.selectSdkDesc: Choose an SDK from the left panel to manage
detail.confirmInstallDesc: This will download and configure {{version}} in the SVC managed directory
detail.clickToSwitch: Click to switch to this version
detail.switchConfirmDesc: This will update PATH to point to this version
detail.reopenTerminalHint: Please reopen your terminal for environment changes to take effect
detail.reinstallConfirmDesc: This will re-download and overwrite the current installation
detail.importingDesc: Configuring system environment variables, please wait...
detail.systemConflictMsg: The following system-level environment variables were detected and may prevent SVC configuration from taking effect. Please remove them manually and restart your terminal:
detail.uninstallConfirmDesc: This will permanently delete all local files for this version
detail.uninstallActiveConfirmDesc: This is the currently active version. Uninstalling will clear the active configuration. Please switch to another version if available.
detail.activeVersionDeleted: {{sdk}} active version deleted. Please switch to another installed version.
detail.needsSwitch: Current version is no longer installed. Please switch to another version.

path.title: System PATH Configuration
path.importConfirmDesc: This will copy {{path}} to the SVC managed directory and update environment variables.
path.emptyPath: No SDK-related paths found in PATH

settings.title: Settings
settings.installPathConfirmDesc: This will copy all SDK files to {{path}} and update environment variables. The current install directory will be automatically backed up to the desktop before migration.
settings.installPathResetConfirm: Confirm reset to default install location?
settings.installPathResetConfirmDesc: This will copy all SDK files to {{path}} and update environment variables. The current install directory will be automatically backed up to the desktop before migration.
settings.installPathBackupHint: The current install directory will be automatically backed up to the desktop before migration (backup file name format: <original_dir_name>_backup_<timestamp>).
settings.githubMirrorDesc: Speed up GitHub downloads. Enter a mirror URL like https://ghfast.top, or leave empty to use the original link
settings.downloadThreadsDesc: Multi-threaded download acceleration. Falls back to single thread if the server does not support range requests
settings.cleanInactiveConfirm: This will delete all installed versions of {{name}} except the active one

logs.title: Log Management
logs.description: View and manage application log files
logs.cleanConfirmDesc: This will delete all log files. This action cannot be undone.
logs.deleteConfirmDesc: Confirm delete file {{filename}}? This action cannot be undone.

about.title: About
about.updateReadyDesc: New version downloaded. Click "Restart Now" to automatically replace and launch the new version. Your settings will be preserved.

home.subtitle: Manage your development environment in one place. Install, switch, and configure SDK versions with ease.

endpoint.title: Endpoint
endpoint.description: Configure custom endpoints for SDK downloads. Leave empty to use defaults.
endpoint.confirmSaveDesc: SDK downloads will use the custom endpoint addresses after saving.
endpoint.confirmResetOneDesc: This will reset the {{sdk}} download endpoint to the program default.
